domain: Maltese Ġgantija megalithic temple (Gozo, 5500+ y/o, UNESCO): 5-apse clover-leaf plan + central axial passage + trilithon doorways + orthostat walls (5m+ stones, tonnes) + corbelled roof of successive horizontal stone courses each smaller than below (false vault); apsidal alcoves branch off central passage at fixed positions; solstice-aligned passage; 2 temples on south plan
specific_mechanism: GGANTIJA-APSIDAL-CORBEL-MEMORY: hierarchical memory architecture with (1) central passage = main retrieval axis (sequential token stream + KV main path); (2) 5 apsidal alcoves = K=5 specialized side-memory banks branching off at fixed axial positions {p_1,...,p_5} (each bank holds specialty domain — facts/summaries/procedures/dialogues/references); (3) corbel-course stepped vault = K-tier stone-course memory where each course size shrinks by factor q ≈ 0.6 — top course = compressed gist (highest abstraction, smallest block), bottom course = full KV (largest); per-course tier-id determines retrieval resolution; (4) trilithon doorway gating: each apse-entry has explicit binary gate g_a = (sim(query, apse_a_signature) > τ_g) opened only when query matches; (5) orthostat anchor stones = K_o large 'anchor' KV blocks pinned across entire context, eviction-immune (analogous to load-bearing megaliths); (6) solstice-aligned axis = positional encoding orientation tied to global context-stride for cross-axis retrieval; (7) Differs from R454 TIERED-KV (3-tier KV, no apse branching) and R470 CHILOTE (3-tier landmark, no corbel-shrink + no trilithon gate) by 5-apse specialty branching + corbel geometric stepping factor q + trilithon binary gate + orthostat anchor pinning.

Differs from R408 ICELANDIC saga-narrative memory (sequential not branched). R428 WAVE-BOWL ceremonial trace memory. R442 ADINKRA symbol-vocabulary memory. R454 TIERED-KV (closest — 3-tier KV, no apse + no corbel). R470 CHILOTE (3-tier landmark, no corbel-shrink). R479 OVOO-LANDMARK-TIER. R492 STALLO-MULTIFUNC-NODE (5-role tag — distinct: tags not architectural branches). Differs from MTDS Springer 2025 + Tiered KV Google + LMCache 2510.09665 + MemArt KV-Centric + HERMES Pipeline by 5-apse specialty + corbel-shrink + trilithon-gate + orthostat-anchor combination. Differs by 5-APSE SPECIALTY BRANCH + CORBEL GEOMETRIC SHRINK + TRILITHON BINARY GATE + ORTHOSTAT ANCHOR PINNING.
